reviews.review_description: This is by far one of the best art games out there. The owner and community is very kind and active! Canvas truly brings out the creative side of me! Not to mention its multiplayer and has special events every week!

developer_response.body: Thanks for contributing to the Canvas and glad you're liking it ! 🖌

reviews.review_description: this game is great. the dev is active with the community, the community is pretty chill and nice, and you can do literally whatever (as long as you have common sense). I made literal Minecraft Steve and a bunch of hearts. 10/10
This is a fun little game with loads of player you can draw on a giant canvas it’s loads of fun

developer_response.body: Thanks for contributing to the Canvas and glad you're having fun ! 🖌

reviews.review_description:
The community is really nice. the music and atmosphere make the game really relaxing. Must give it a try.
The hands of other players look a bit laggy (Due to bad wifi maybe).

developer_response.body:
Thanks for contributing to the Canvas and glad you're liking it ! 🖌
About the hands, it's probably a server-side issue, sorry !

reviews.review_description: This Game is just Great! It also has Top Hats. 🎩

I'm not much of a creative person but I've been meaning to get into something and this game is a good inspiration to get creating. I can create things amongst others and whatever I make will be visible for everyone else to see. It's pretty cool seeing something you've made in an environment like this

developer_response.body: I'm glad Canvas inspires you ! Thank you for contributing to it 🖌

reviews.review_title: This is an awesome art app.
reviews.review_description: This is definitely one of the coolest things I've seen. The collaboration is amazing here. Did you see the crazy stuff people have made?! It's honestly crazy. Overall the coolest app I've used.

developer_response.body: Thank you ! Glad you're liking it ! ✨🖌
